root_cause: Cambridge University IT outage since March 2024. Maintainer Stephen Burgess confirmed 'no timetable for restoring' PhenoScanner. Server at 131.111.94.77 does not respond on any port. See GitHub issue phenoscanner/phenoscanner#6.
workaround: GWAS Catalog REST API (gwas_get_associations_for_snp, gwas_get_snps_for_gene) covers GWAS phenotype-genotype associations. OpenTargets covers variant-disease evidence. eQTL/pQTL/mQTL catalogues have no single public REST API equivalent.
investigation_notes: Connection timeout on both port 80 and 443 (firewall or server down)
GitHub issue #6 opened 2024-03-08, maintainer confirmed 'massive IT outage'
As of 2024-05-18: 'no timetable yet for restoring'
As of 2024-10-05: still non-functional per latest GitHub comment
As of 2026-03-24: still unreachable (3 retry attempts, all timeout)
R package (phenoscanner) and Python CLI (phenoscannerpy) both use same broken API URL
GWAS Catalog covers GWAS associations; eQTL/pQTL/mQTL have no single REST alternative
Workaround queries GWAS Catalog for SNP and gene phenotype associations
